failure_scenarios.trigger_condition: Docker not available, fallback to subprocess with untrusted code
failure_scenarios.fix_applied: FIX-OPT-001a: Fail-closed - removed insecure subprocess fallback

failure_scenarios.trigger_condition: GitHub token logged or exposed in error messages
failure_scenarios.fix_applied: FIX-OPT-002b: Token passed via environment variable, not embedded in URL

failure_scenarios.trigger_condition: Workspace cleanup fails, temporary files accumulate
failure_scenarios.fix_applied: FIX-OPT-003a: Robust cleanup with retry logic and exponential backoff

root_cause_analyses.proximate_cause: Subprocess fallback executes without security isolation
root_cause_analyses.root_cause: Architectural flaw: Fallback prioritized availability over security
root_cause_analyses.fix_applied: Removed insecure fallback, fail-closed when Docker unavailable

root_cause_analyses.root_cause: Security anti-pattern: Credentials in URL exposed in logs/process listings
root_cause_analyses.fix_applied: Token passed via GIT_USERNAME environment variable

root_cause_analyses.root_cause: Resource management flaw: No retry logic, no error reporting
root_cause_analyses.fix_applied: Added _cleanup_workspace() with retry and exponential backoff

patches.description: Fail-closed: Raise error when Docker unavailable instead of insecure fallback
patches.security_impact: CRITICAL FIX - Prevents arbitrary code execution on host

patches.description: Use token via environment variable instead of embedding in URL
patches.security_impact: HIGH FIX - Prevents token exposure in logs/process listings

patches.description: Robust cleanup with retry logic and exponential backoff
patches.resource_impact: MEDIUM FIX - Prevents disk space exhaustion

bug_id_001.attack: Attempt to execute malicious code when Docker unavailable
bug_id_001.details: Code now fails closed with clear error message. No insecure fallback.

bug_id_002.attack: Check process listings for token exposure
bug_id_002.details: Token passed via environment variable, not in command line URL

bug_id_002_b.details: Token not embedded in URL, stderr sanitized before logging

bug_id_003.details: Retry logic with exponential backoff handles transient failures

tests_to_add.description: Verify DockerSandbox fails closed when Docker unavailable
tests_to_add.expected_behavior: Returns ExecutionResult with error about Docker requirement
tests_to_add.failure_behavior: Would execute subprocess without isolation (SECURITY BUG)

tests_to_add.description: Verify GitHub token not exposed in process listings
Verify workspace cleanup with retry logic

checks.no_new_race_conditions: ✅ PASS - No concurrent access patterns introduced
checks.no_performance_regression: ✅ PASS - Retry logic only on cleanup (non-critical path)
checks.no_security_vulnerability_introduced: ✅ PASS - Two critical security issues fixed
checks.all_new_tests_pass: ⚠️ PENDING - Tests need to be added (see regression_tests)
checks.rollback_plan_documented: ✅ PASS - git revert safe for all patches

human_review_items: Add regression tests for security fixes before merge
Verify Docker requirement is acceptable for deployment targets
